elements.description: Initializes Crashlytics and returns true if the core Firebase extension is available and the default FirebaseApp has been initialized.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.initialize

elements.description: Sets whether Crashlytics collection is enabled for this app on this device.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.set_enabled

elements.description: Returns whether Crashlytics collection is enabled.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.is_enabled

returnvalues.doc: True if Crashlytics collection is enabled.
returnvalues.name: boolean

elements.description: Returns whether the app crashed during the previous execution.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.did_crash_on_previous_execution

returnvalues.doc: True if a crash was recorded during the previous execution.
returnvalues.name: boolean

elements.description: Sends queued crash reports when automatic collection is disabled.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.send_unsent_reports

elements.description: Deletes queued crash reports when automatic collection is disabled.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.delete_unsent_reports

elements.description: Sets the user ID associated with subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.set_user_id

elements.description: Sets a string, number, or boolean custom key for subsequent fatal, non-fatal, and ANR reports.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.set_custom_key

elements.description: Logs a message that is included in the next fatal, non-fatal, or ANR report.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.log

elements.description: Records a non-fatal exception with the supplied message.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.record_exception

elements.description: Records a Lua runtime error as a non-fatal exception with parsed Lua stack frames when a traceback is supplied.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.record_lua_error

parameters.doc: Lua traceback string, typically supplied by sys.set_error_handler. May be nil or omitted.
parameters.name: traceback

elements.description: Forces a Java crash for Crashlytics setup testing. Android only.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.test_java_crash

elements.description: Forces a native crash for Crashlytics setup testing.
elements.name: firebase.crashlytics.test_native_crash

elements.description: Functions for interacting with Firebase Crashlytics

info.description: Functions and constants for interacting with Firebase
info.name: extension-firebase-crashlytics
